parameters.query:
INSERT INTO api_queue (queue_type, operation, priority, url, method, body, source_workflow, source_entry_id)
VALUES (
    'memento_api',
    'PATCH_PODPIS',
    3,
    'https://api.mementodatabase.com/v1/libraries/2fNM2Za4G/entries/' || '{{ $json.podpisId }}' || '?token={{MEMENTO_API_TOKEN}}',
    'PATCH',
    '{"fields": [{"id": 23, "value": "' || '{{ $json.messageId }}' || '"}, {"id": 24, "value": "' || '{{ $json.chatId }}' || '"}, {"id": 4, "value": "Doručená"}]}'::jsonb,
    'Request Signature',
    '{{ $json.podpisId }}'
)
RETURNING id;
